claim: Apply Karpathy's auto-research pattern to Claude Code skills: read skill.md, make change, run test, check score, keep/revert, loop autonomously
actionable: Set up self-improving skill loops using binary assertions (true/false tests) and autonomous iteration without human approval

claim: Vague skill descriptions result in only 20% activation rate; clear, specific descriptions are critical for skill trigger accuracy
actionable: Invest effort in precise skill YAML descriptions; they determine whether Claude recognizes when to use your skill

claim: Anthropic skill creator already has a built-in loop to improve skill descriptions based on trigger accuracy testing
actionable: Use the skill creator skill's description improvement loop; don't manually iterate skill descriptions

claim: Use binary assertions (true/false) for automated skill testing, not subjective criteria like 'compelling' which can't be automated
actionable: When defining evals for skills, write assertions like 'contains no m-dashes' or 'under 300 words' instead of subjective quality measures

claim: Create evals.json with 25 binary assertions across multiple test prompts; skill loop iterates to improve pass rate until perfect
actionable: Define 20-30 concrete true/false assertions for your skill (format, structure, word count, patterns) and let the loop refine skill.md to pass all

claim: Binary assertion loops handle structure, format, word counts, patterns but NOT tone, creative quality, or proper reference file usage
actionable: Use binary loops for structural improvements; use manual human review (skill creator evals dashboard) for qualitative feedback

claim: Run self-improving loops overnight; they continue until hitting perfect score or reaching diminishing returns, then stop without asking for approval
actionable: Set up autonomous skill improvement with instruction 'Never ask for permission; keep running until perfect or I interrupt you'

claim: Skill creator skill has built-in qualitative eval dashboard for side-by-side output review, feedback, and reference file AB testing
actionable: Use skill creator's eval dashboard for manual review of tone, creative quality, and reference file usage; binary loops handle structure
